name: Labrador Iron Mines Holdings Ltd.
description: Labrador Iron Mines Holdings Limited is a mineral resource company engaged in the exploration and development of iron ore projects in the central part of the Labrador Trough region. Situated near Schefferville, Quebec, the company holds extensive iron ore resources and mineral exploration claims across Newfoundland and Labrador and Quebec. Its primary focus includes direct shipping iron ore (DSO) projects and the Elizabeth Taconite Project. The company is currently positioned to resume mining operations and development of its Houston Mine, subject to market conditions, financing, and the negotiation of major contracts.
